## Checklist

- [ ] Linting passes locally (`ruff check backend/` · `cd frontend && npm run lint`)
- [ ] Type hints added to any new Python functions
- [ ] Docs updated if this changes any behavior, API, or prompt format
- [ ] No secrets or API keys in the diff
- [ ] If prompts changed: note which stage(s) and what you changed in the description above
